title: Agent Zoro
summary: Autonomous AI job application agent for software, data, and AI job search workflows.
description: Agent Zoro discovers jobs, scores resume fit, queues suitable roles, fills ATS applications, uploads resumes, answers screening questions, submits safely with guardrails, and tracks confirmations through reports and Gmail labels.
resumeBullet: Built Agent Zoro, an autonomous AI job application agent using Python and Playwright to discover, score, queue, fill, and submit job applications across ATS platforms with scheduling, guardrails, reporting, and Gmail-based tracking.

workflow.title: Discover
workflow.text: Find fresh roles from supported ATS platforms.

workflow.title: Match
workflow.text: Score jobs against resume and preferences.

workflow.title: Apply
workflow.text: Fill forms, upload resumes, answer questions.

workflow.title: Track
workflow.text: Save reports and label confirmation emails.

features.title: Supported Platforms
features.text: Greenhouse, Stripe, Dice, Ashby, and Lever.

features.title: Guardrails
features.text: One company, one application. Fresh jobs only. Avoid unsupported roles and risky forms.

features.title: Automation
features.text: Scheduled application windows, resume routing, reports, and Gmail tracking labels.

title: Stock Piler
summary: Stock and ETF tracking dashboard with market data, alerting, and conservative investing guardrails.
description: Stock Piler tracks a global stock and ETF watchlist, detects ticker symbols from company names, refreshes market prices with Yahoo Finance and yfinance, monitors daily lows, and prepares WhatsApp-ready buy alerts while keeping all Robinhood trades manual.
resumeBullet: Built Stock Piler, a Python and JavaScript stock tracking dashboard with Yahoo Finance/yfinance market data, ticker detection, persistent watchlists, daily-low buy alerts, WhatsApp-ready messages, and Robinhood safety guardrails.

workflow.title: Track
workflow.text: Manage global stocks, ETFs, ADRs, and user-added symbols.

workflow.title: Resolve
workflow.text: Find ticker symbols from company names like Netflix, Tata, or Foxconn.

workflow.title: Alert
workflow.text: Detect daily-low trigger levels and prepare WhatsApp buy alerts.

workflow.title: Guard
workflow.text: Keep real-money trading manual with no auto-buying or auto-selling.

features.title: Market Data
features.text: Yahoo Finance chart APIs, optional yfinance integration, and quote refresh endpoints.

features.title: Alerts
features.text: Daily-low checks, WhatsApp share links, and optional Cloud API message hooks.

features.title: Deployment
features.text: Local server mode plus Cloud Run, Firestore, Docker, and scheduler-ready APIs.
